# Agent Files

This folder contains workspace custom agents for VS Code.

Files:
- orchestrator.agent.md
- planning-agent.agent.md
- functional-generator.agent.md
- policy-discriminator.agent.md
- heartbeat-maintainer.agent.md

Start with orchestrator.agent.md for the full planning-first generator-discriminator loop.
Use heartbeat-maintainer.agent.md when the extension-backed heartbeat runtime needs one bounded autonomous maintenance cycle.
